candidates.stop_logic: If filled, stop is reviewed after T+1 session close unless price breaches invalidation intraday with abnormal volume.
candidates.thesis: AI semiconductor leadership remains constructive if price reclaims short-term momentum above trigger.

candidates.stop_logic: If filled, exit review occurs after T+1 unless invalidation is breached and sector breadth turns risk-off.
candidates.thesis: Software AI beta is acceptable only on controlled pullback with broader AI sector support.

market_regime.notes: AI sector leadership is constructive but index breadth is mixed.
